rationale: Bulk_write not propagating write concern violates write concern spec; bugs found via command monitoring spec testing.
Perl-internal dual-var (PVIV/PVNV) type detection bug; no BSON spec rule governs Perl scalar internals.
Same dual-var bug as PERL-893 in BSON::XS; Perl-internal implementation issue, not a spec rule violation.
Thin description; tests fail when BSON.pm wrappers replace MongoDB.pm wrappers; compatibility issue, no spec details.
Internal refactor replacing wire version checks with feature discovery methods; no behavior change, no spec rule.
Memory leak in BSON::XS decoding of DBRef/Code; resource management bug, no contradicted spec rule.
Dependency compatibility break: Type::Tiny::XS tightened Bool definition; build/dependency issue, no spec involvement.
Backward-compatible constructor argument name 'sec' vs 'secs'; Perl API compat issue, not a BSON spec rule.
BSON::String boolean overload triggers numification warning; Perl operator overloading bug, no spec rule.
Drop heavy DateTime dependency in favor of on-demand inflation; dependency management, no spec rule.
Rewrite documentation for MongoDB::DataTypes POD; documentation-only update.
Spelling error fix; documentation only.
Conditionally require BSON::XS when compiler is available; build/packaging change, no spec rule.
URI user-info encoding violates RFC 3986 s3.2.1: '%' incorrectly allowed, subdelimiters incorrectly rejected.
Topology type detection regression: direct connections to replica set members broke; SDAM topology spec violated.
Test flakiness: sessions-end.t queries per-mongos local session count, not global; test isolation bug.
Skip maxScan tests on server 4.1+; version-gating spec tests, depends on DRIVERS-502.
BSON::XS memory leaks: cycle detection frees stack early, call_perl_reader doesn't mortalize return; XS implementation bugs.
BSON::Doc XS encoding corrupts Perl stack before 5.26; XS implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
CI failure: Authen::SCRAM deep dependency String::Compare::ConstantTime causes test warnings; CI/dependency issue.
Create v2 upgrading documentation; documentation-only work.
max_staleness_spec.t fails on 32-bit Perl integers; platform-specific test failure, not a driver behavior nonconformance.
Sessions spec requires gossiping $clusterTime via SDAM; driver did not gossip $clusterTime at all.
Update spec test format for bulk writes and retryable writes YAML to match new upstream spec format; depends DRIVERS-480.
Spec changed: startAtOperationTime must be omitted on create, set from aggregate operationTime on resume; driver did it wrong.
Change streams spec requires support for explicit sessions; driver did not support them.
Resync retryable writes spec tests from upstream specs repo; depends DRIVERS-503, DRIVERS-476, SPEC-1005.
Circular references between MongoClient, _SessionPool, _Topology, and SCRAM client; internal OO/memory management bug.
Thread test crashes in global destruction with refcount errors; threading/memory bug, no spec rule violated.
Provide transaction code examples for documentation; documentation work only.
Add public 'client' method to Database class for session access ergonomics; API addition, no spec rule violated.
Expand documentation on Transactions in ClientSession; thin description, documentation work only.
t/cursor.t intermittently fails 'away cursor' test; flaky test, no spec nonconformance.
Document how to avoid @INC shadowing on installation of new version; installation documentation.
Uninitialized value warning when using default compression level; Perl warning in Compress::Zlib usage, not a spec violation.
BSON/BSON::XS tests emit warnings about deprecated MongoDB classes; test cleanup, no spec involvement.
Test references removed class MongoDB::BSON::_EncodedDoc; dead test code cleanup, no spec issue.
BSON::XS fails to build on old Perls due to missing pthread_once; platform/build issue.
Moo defers destructor installation; private constructor bypasses this, preventing destructor calls; internal OO bug.
Don't require BSON::XS on Windows XP which lacks Vista+ APIs; platform/build decision, no spec rule.
Document that X509 auth no longer requires username after PERL-679; documentation-only update.
Spelling errors reported by Lintian; documentation fix only.
BSON::XS requires Windows Vista+; refuse to build on XP; platform/build constraint, no spec rule.
Amend transaction examples in documentation; documentation fix only.
GridFS DownloadStream emits warnings in spec tests on old Perls; Perl version compat warning, not spec nonconformance.
BSON spec: top-level document $ref key must not be treated as DBRef; BSON::XS incorrectly inflated it.
Document existing TCP keepalive default behavior; documentation-only work, depends DRIVERS-383 for spec guidance.
BSON::Doc can't be used as sort option due to Tie::IxHash coercion gap; Perl API ergonomics bug, no spec rule violated.
Index key order not preserved in list results; Perl hash ordering issue, no spec rule requiring key order preservation.
Validate hint as string or ordered doc for aggregate; input validation/coercion improvement, no specific spec rule cited.
